summary: Successfully tested Eleitora 360 SPCE fields in Receitas and Despesas, Conformidade TSE page, and Recibo Eleitoral PDF download. All backend tests (14/14) and frontend tests (23/23) passed. The application correctly implements SPCE compliance fields required for TSE electoral accounting.

issues: CNPJ da campanha não configurado - alerts shown as expected, user needs to configure in settings

recibo_eleitoral_pdf.note: PDF download endpoint returns valid PDF content

conformidade_tse.note: Page shows 62% complete with alerts for missing CNPJ and eleitores configuration

authentication_jwt.note: JWT login working with 24h token expiration

mocked_apis_list: Banco do Brasil PIX - uses simulado mode when OAuth fails (BB credentials configured in homologação)

seed_data_creation: Test revenues and expenses created during testing were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SPCE features are working correctly. Backend and frontend tests are in place. BB PIX integration is configured with real credentials in homologação mode but falls back to simulado mode for actual transactions. CNPJ da campanha is not configured in the test campaign - this is expected and shown as an alert in Conformidade TSE page.
